json.description: AgentGuard47 is runtime safety infrastructure for AI agents. It adds budget caps, loop detection, retry limits, timeouts, local traces, and incident reports so agents can stop bad runs while they are happening, not just explain them afterward.

AGENTGUARD_API_KEY.description: AgentGuard read API key for traces, alerts, costs, usage, and budget health.

AGENTGUARD_URL.description: Optional AgentGuard API base URL. Defaults to production.

json.name: Agentguard47
